dashboard.label: Audit History
dashboard.description: Complete audit trail of all Data Heartbeat actions

search.query: | inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | stats count by performed_by | fields performed_by
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where sourcetype!="_all_" | stats count by sourcetype | fields sourcetype

| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | search action=$filter_action$ performed_by=$filter_user$ sourcetype=$filter_sourcetype$ | eval ts_epoch = if(isnum(timestamp), timestamp, 0) | where ts_epoch >= relative_time(now(), "$time_filter.earliest$") OR "$time_filter.earliest$"="" | sort - ts_epoch | head 1000 | eval time = strftime(ts_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval action_display = case( action="added", "Source Added", action="removed", "Source Removed", action="threshold_changed", "Threshold Changed", action="importance_changed", "Importance Changed", action="detection_run", "Detection Run", action="discovery_run", "Discovery Run", action="status_changed", "Status Changed", 1=1, action) | eval change_info = case( previous_value!="" AND new_value!="", previous_value." → ".new_value, new_value!="", new_value, previous_value!="", previous_value." (cleared)", 1=1, "—") | table time, action_display, sourcetype, change_info, performed_by, details | rename time as "Timestamp", action_display as "Action", sourcetype as "Sourcetype", change_info as "Change", performed_by as "Performed By", details as "Details"

format.colorPalette: {"Source Added":#53A051,"Source Removed":#DC4E41,"Threshold Changed":#006D9C,"Importance Changed":#F8BE34,"Detection Run":#9E72C5,"Discovery Run":#65A637,"Status Changed":#00D4FF}

search.query: | inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where timestamp > relative_time(now(), "-30d") | stats count
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where timestamp > relative_time(now(), "-30d") | search action="added" | stats count
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where timestamp > relative_time(now(), "-30d") | search action="removed" | stats count
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where timestamp > relative_time(now(), "-30d") | search action="threshold_changed" | stats count
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where timestamp > relative_time(now(), "-30d") | search action="importance_changed" | stats count

| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | search action=$filter_action$ performed_by=$filter_user$ sourcetype=$filter_sourcetype$ | eval date = strftime(timestamp, "%Y-%m-%d") | stats count by date, action | sort date
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | search action=$filter_action$ performed_by=$filter_user$ sourcetype=$filter_sourcetype$ | stats count by action | sort - count
| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | search action=$filter_action$ performed_by=$filter_user$ sourcetype=$filter_sourcetype$ | stats count by performed_by | sort - count | head 10

| inputlookup heartbeat_audit_log | where sourcetype!="_all_" | search action=$filter_action$ performed_by=$filter_user$ sourcetype=$filter_sourcetype$ | stats count by sourcetype | sort - count | head 10
